biological_replicate: the effect of Vdr gene suppression under TGF-β1 stimulation in C2C12 mouse skeletal muscle cells.
technical_replicate: the experiments were divided into three phases.
experimental_design: the effects of D3 and its metabolites on myogenic differentiation under TGF-β1 stimulation.
factor_value: the effective doses of D3, 25D3, and 1,25D3 were used.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
